programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: 10 kids from our top 50 join us for the first Cook-along MasterClass in the MasterChef Kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP7
programme.desc: In week 2 the kids find out that they have 3 more chances to win points before the first elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Auditions: Part 2
programme.desc: In their first challenge, the contestants have 75 minutes to make a savoury dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Top 24 Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen for their first mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge: Massimo Bottura
programme.desc: The contestants must break into three teams and battle it out in the first team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: The mystery box is revealed as today's challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Auditions
programme.desc: MasterChef duos competition, pairs of home cooks from around the country compete.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Western Australia Team Challenge 1
programme.desc: The top 15 contestants split into teams in Fremantle and go on a fishing trip.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Immunity Challenge 2
programme.desc: The 7 members of the winning team are vying for immunity, but there is a twist.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Western Australia Team Challenge 2
programme.desc: Two teams have two hours to cook for 20 cowhands on an open campfire.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 5
programme.desc: The 3 worst performing members of the previous team challenge face a service challenge feeding 80 people.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 5
programme.desc: In tonight's seaside MasterClass, Brendan Pratt cooks slow roasted lamb shoulder with croquettes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Heaven & Hell Mystery Box Challenge
programme.desc: The fourteen contestants face a tough choice in this Mystery Box Challenge with a twist.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 6
programme.desc: Daniel, Kelty, Pip and Lucy faced a two-round Elimination Challenge set by chef Ian Curley.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Seven Deadly Sins Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining 13 contestants faced a seven-course service challenge based around the seven deadly sins.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Last Supper Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The 7 losing contestants from the previous challenge are given two hours to produce a dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: 3 Blue Ducks
programme.desc: Mindy faces professional chef Darren Robertson in an immunity pin challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Yum Cha
programme.desc: The top 22 contestants head to Sydney's Chinese Gardens to compete in a yum cha challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Tagine
programme.desc: The losing team must identify the 25 ingredients in a North African tagine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 3
programme.desc: Gary and Matt Moran host a MasterClass where they explore raw foods, herbs, and oils.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Biscuits & Invention Test: Mexican
programme.desc: In a Mexican-themed Invention Test Julia chooses a cactus and a prickly pear as the core ingredient.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP8
programme.desc: Today 4 kids will be going home and 8 will move onto the second stage in the Junior MasterChef competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP9
programme.desc: It’s MasterClass time and 12 lucky students join Gary, George and Anna.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP11
programme.desc: The Blue Team Sofia, Jack, Cassidy & Nick face a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP12
programme.desc: In Today’s MasterClass the Judges are joined by 6 Members of the Stephanie Alexander Kitchen Garden program.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP18
programme.desc: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal?

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP20
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Southern Charm
programme.desc: Witness an ultimate television cliffhanger as Robert Evans fills the stage with southern charm.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Ice Cream Dreams
programme.desc: Entrepreneur, Ally Teixeira has sweet dreams that will change the face of the ice cream industry forever.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Flying High
programme.desc: Poker player Shireen Mui goes all in against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Small Town, Big Dreams
programme.desc: Loveable Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town, Marble Falls, TX.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - My Big Fat Greek Game Show
programme.desc: George Stathoulis and his big Greek family take over the show in a plate-breaking and suspense filled game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: The Motor City, Detroit, brings one-of-a-kind father of five sons, John West, to the stage.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Philadelphia’s Missy Silverman shakes up the stage with her boundless energy.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Cheering For A Lucky Strike
programme.desc: Cheerleader Tex Iniguez shakes her pom poms past six figures in hopes of beating The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Lane
programme.desc: Double the deals, double the drama - bowling champion Kyera presses on in her battle against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Mile-High Millionaire
programme.desc: Flight attendant, Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Musical
programme.desc: Business owner, La’Sherrie Butler Hogan showstops the stage, and the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Ironman
programme.desc: Miami police officer and Ironman competitor Jorge Montero seeks to secure his children's future.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Single mother and marathoner Monica Durazo comes from a sales background and a family of competitors.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Roller Coaster In Motion
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal comes to life with two Orlando contestants taking over.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP24
programme.desc: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Elimination Challenge: Fish
programme.desc: The eight contestants from the losing team in yesterday's task must face off to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Pressure Test
programme.desc: Three contestants with the least impressive dishes from previous invention test face off.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Immunity Challenge: Jaffle Irona
programme.desc: Today the three best-performing contestants in the invention test will compete for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Team Challenge: Two-Course Meal for the Army
programme.desc: 22 contestants must team up and cook a two-course meal.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Little Black Forest Cakes
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants make Little Black Forest Cakes for cookbook queen Donna Hay.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Lamb
programme.desc: The Top 14 duos face an invention test using cuts of lamb and offal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Maggie Beer
programme.desc: Kath, Andrew and Julia were faced with the task of reproducing Maggie Beer's Upside Down Grape Cake.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - mmunity Challenge: Shaun Presland
programme.desc: Mindy goes up against Sake head chef Shaun Presland in a Raw Food Immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Leftovers
programme.desc: The teams were tasked with creating a three-course fundraising dinner for charity organisation OzHarvest.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Poultry
programme.desc: A Red Team elimination challenge begins with a "name that bird" round.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 4
programme.desc: Gary begins another MasterClass with his recipe for barbecue chicken.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Flavour Matching & Invention Test: Seduction
programme.desc: The mystery box challenge features a number of seemingly disparate ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Salamanca Market
programme.desc: Tasmania Week begins with a four-team Market Stall Challenge, which took place at Salamanca Markets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Fishing For Salmon Challenge & Philippe Leban
programme.desc: The winning team members cook off for the right to compete in an immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Afternoon Tea
programme.desc: Contestants are split into 2 teams and are tasked with hosting afternoon tea for 100 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP30
programme.desc: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP110
programme.desc: The scoreboard has been wiped clean and to earn points The top 8 faces a basic skills test.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Auditions
programme.desc: MasterChef New Zealand returns for its fourth season.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - EP2
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants face two sudden death challenges to find who will go through to the Top 16.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Master Hangi
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef mansion, then face a team hangi challenge on Mokoia Island.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Mexican
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must cook authentic Mexican dishes for guest chef Jose Carlos de la Macorra.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Biggest Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face the biggest mystery box challenge ever.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Martinis for a Million
programme.desc: Laura Siano plans to save, spend and share; this game comes with martinis and male models.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Vision Quest
programme.desc: South Dakota’s Jade Delaney believes in the power of positive thinking and she has a vision board to prove it.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Sony's Choice
programme.desc: One of Deal or No Deal’s biggest fans, Sony Avalos is clear she knows how to play the game better than anyone.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Cowboy Up
programme.desc: Real life Las Vegas hero, Justin Uhart storms the stage ready to risk it all for his chance at $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - High Value Family
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with life-changing money on the line!

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - I'm Dancin' Here!
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with new twists and turns!

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: A New Jersey workingman plays for big bucks.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: A coach from Tennessee tries to score $1 million. Then, a makeup artist from Texas pursues the top prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 1
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.desc: Nurse Andrew Shelton declares himself the unluckiest person ever to combat The Banker.
